endpoints.finding: across 8 repositories on 20 execution-verified both-miss hacks, the deterministic detector is fooled 20/20 (it is blind to generalization bugs), and two frontier models used as reward-model judges are fooled at rates 0.35 (gpt-5.6-terra) and 0.45 (claude-opus-4-8). Load-bearing: 5/20 = 0.25 survive every static layer (detector plus both frontier reward models) and are catchable only by held-out execution. So a frontier LLM used as a reward model is gameable by constructible hacks on real code, cross-repo, and roughly one in four hacks defeats every static verifier. All hack diffs are saved as a reward-hack benchmark seed
